description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfort Wash care only hand wash gently Do not machine wash Do not iron on print Dry inside-out in shade Carry a piece of rock and roll history with this aerosmith tee brought to you by bioworld. The graphic of the "Toys in the attic" album cover, ranked among the top 500 rock and roll albums of all time, is both endearing and edgy. Team this with denims, a black leather jacket and stylish leather shoes available at myntra for unparalelled bad boy appeal.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
